release_notes: Mobile WebUI Perfection, Notification Center Stability, and Telegram Channel Hardening.

changes.note: Fixed mobile chat header overflow and session list scrolling.
Added touch scrolling and flex constraints for mobile sidebar.
Debounced render with requestAnimationFrame and simplified mark-all-read.
Auto-close notification dropdown when opening mobile sidebar.
Added FIFO eviction for _chat_ids, stop() guards, and nested bold/italic markdown parsing.
Removed deprecated Help button from sidebar tools.
